project_description: Complete chess education platform for schools, clubs and academies with class management, student tracking, interactive chess board, tournaments, and analytics.

test_cases.name: Homepage and Navigation Test
test_cases.description: Verify that the homepage loads correctly and basic navigation works
steps: Check that user is redirected to dashboard (dev mode)
test_cases.expected_result: Homepage loads successfully and navigation works properly

test_cases.name: Authentication Flow Test
test_cases.description: Test the authentication system in development mode
steps: Verify dev mode authentication is active
Check that mock user (dev@localhost.com) is authenticated
Verify user profile information is displayed
test_cases.expected_result: Authentication works correctly in development mode

test_cases.name: Dashboard Analytics Test
test_cases.description: Verify dashboard loads and displays analytics correctly
steps: Check analytics cards display (centers, students, classes)
test_cases.expected_result: Dashboard displays analytics and metrics correctly

test_cases.name: College Management Test
test_cases.description: Test creating and managing educational centers
test_cases.expected_result: College management CRUD operations work correctly

test_cases.name: Class Management Test
steps: Fill in class details (name, level, schedule)

test_cases.name: Skills Management Test
test_cases.description: Test chess skills creation and assignment
steps: Verify skill appears in class curriculum

test_cases.name: Chess Board Component Test
test_cases.description: Test the interactive chess board functionality
steps: Navigate to chess exercises or lessons
test_cases.expected_result: Chess board works correctly and validates moves

test_cases.name: Responsive Design Test
test_cases.description: Test application responsiveness on different screen sizes
test_cases.expected_result: Application is fully responsive across all devices

test_cases.name: Error Handling Test
test_cases.description: Test application error handling and validation
test_cases.expected_result: Application handles errors gracefully with proper user feedback

test_cases.name: Performance Test
test_cases.description: Test application loading performance and responsiveness
steps: Verify no memory leaks in browser
test_cases.expected_result: Application performs well with fast load times

test_cases.name: Data Persistence Test
test_cases.description: Test that data is properly saved and retrieved
test_cases.expected_result: All data persists correctly and syncs with database

environments.name: development
environments.description: Local development environment with mock authentication
